evidence: "Great movie and comedy, with a serious end which provokes thought about taking serious the illusion we think reality is"
"Great, humorous, light hearted with an interwoven story line, that keeps changing."
"The story certainly has a great twist, requiring a recap, to set the understanding of the viewer in order."
"There is so much going on, and characters to keep track of."
"The story is of interest, but the presentation is boring, in my opinion."
"It isn't as if you need to think much about what the story is saying."
"Still enjoyed it. Would not watch again in this life."
"Got everyone hooked. Interesting and keeps us coming back for more."
"We are now enjoying season 2. Too many channels, and nothing good on regular TV."
"The twists and turns just kept coming. Always wondering just where is it going now."
"Great cast of characters. We were riveted to it."
"Great movie and comedy, with a serious end which provokes thought about taking serious the illusion we think reality is."

summary: The user enjoys complex narratives with a mix of drama, comedy, and sci-fi elements. They appreciate engaging sensory experiences and emotional depth but have mixed feelings about pacing and production quality.
